授業方法: Classes will be conducted primarily through student presentations, with the instructor providing feedback and supplementary explanations as needed. Specifically, students will be divided into ten groups, and each group will be assigned one part of the textbook and will give a presentation on its content. (Chapters 1 and 9 will be covered by the instructor). At the beginning of each class, a comprehension-check quiz will be administered on the chapter to be discussed that day. A final examination will be held on the last day of the course.
